title: Cobblemon Delights
description: A Forge and Fabric Mod that integrates Farmers Delights and Cobblemon
body:
Integrates Cobblemon to the Farmers Delights system.
Currently, it adds two new edibles called: Curry and Sweet Curry.
We plan to add more in the future when the Cobblemon berry update comes!

Sprites are made by: Me!
Thanks to @Yamato for helping out programming the items!
